title: McCarthy Tétrault Solidifies its M&A and Private Equity Expertise with New Partner Maxine Ethier
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Solidifies its M&A and Private Equity Expertise with New Partner Maxine Ethier
We are pleased to welcome Maxine Ethier as a Partner in the firm’s Business Law Group in Toronto. Maxine is a strategic advisor with broad domestic and international experience in M&A and private equity particularly in the infrastructure, energy transition and real estate sectors.
A seasoned dealmaker, Maxine brings over 20 years of experience managing complex transactions across global markets, including in the U.S., Latin America, Australia, India, and Asia. She has advised on high-profile acquisitions, divestments, and the implementation of major projects and public-private partnerships (PPPs).
Maxine’s extensive expertise in M&A and private equity, and deep connections in the infrastructure and energy sectors further enhance our ability to deliver strategic, business-focused advice to our clients.
“Maxine’s expertise in real asset investments, combined with her global M&A experience across diverse markets, will bring tremendous value to our clients,” said Eva Bellissimo , Partner, and National Business Law Practice Group Leader. “Her strong track record in managing complex transactions across multiple sectors will further elevate our dealmaking capabilities.”
Maxine’s in-house and prior private practice experience gives her a unique perspective into our clients’ strategic objectives and positions her to provide successful results.
“I’m thrilled to join the team and contribute to the firm’s renowned expertise in M&A, private equity and infrastructure. I’m particularly excited to collaborate on innovative projects in the energy transition and sustainable investment spaces, areas that are shaping the future of global markets,” said Maxine.
With expertise in the industries that matter most to the global business landscape, our M&A Group has the proven experience to get deals done. Clients benefit from our history of industry-focused advice and perspective. No matter the size or complexity, McCarthy Tétrault has a leading position advising on the transactions most important to your business, such as mergers, acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures and partnerships in a wide range of industries. Our M&A Group specializes in advising clients on the largest and most innovative domestic and international deals. We have knowledge and expertise in every type of M&A transaction, and we have played a principal role acting for every type of transaction participant. Learn how our team can help you.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact:
- Maxine Ethier Partner | Co-Head, National Infrastructure Group People.Offices.Singular Toronto
